Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBEnd/:
caldera
                    /12 11
                    /farmer 6 10 2
                    /setSkipActions AddItem (O){{ModID}}_DarknessCharm#AddItem (O)ButterflyPowder#mushymato.LivestockBazaar_AdoptPet 7A.Darkness 0 Darkness
                    /addTemporaryActor 7A.Ebony 32 32 7 11 2 false Character
                    /addTemporaryActor 7A.Darkness 32 32 25 13 2 false Character
                    /changeName 7A.Ebony Ebony
                    /changeName 7A.Darkness Darkness
                    /ignoreCollisions 7A.Ebony
                    /ignoreCollisions 7A.Darkness
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 27
                    /skippable
                    /pause 1000

                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 33
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /playSound crow
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 16 true
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 0
                    /pause 800
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "We... We made it?$u#$b#We actually made it!$l"
                    /emote farmer 8 true
                    /advancedMove farmer false 0 1 1 10
                    /waitForAllStationary
                    /pause 300
                    /faceDirection farmer 3
                    /pause 300
                    /faceDirection farmer 1
                    /pause 200
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Alright! No time to stand around...$a"
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 33
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /playSound crow
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 0
                    /pause 500
                    /viewport move 1 0 16000
                    /advancedMove 7A.Ebony false 0 2 2 0 4 700 0 0 2 500 0 0 4 500 5 0 4 700 0 0 2 500 0 0 4 500 6 0 4 700 0 0 2 500 0 0 4 500 0 0 1 10
                    /pause 1000
                    /textAboveHead 7A.Ebony "Darkness...?"
                    /advancedMove farmer false 0 3 3 0 4 700 0 0 2 500 0 0 4 500 5 0 4 700 0 0 2 500 0 0 4 500 6 0 1 10 
                    /pause 5000 
                    /textAboveHead 7A.Ebony "Where are you...?"
                    /pause 1000
                    /emote farmer 8
                    /waitForAllStationary
                    /pause 300
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 35
                    /playSound crow
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 16 true
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 34
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 4
                    /pause 800
                    /playMusic CnC_VampiresPiano
                    /shake 7A.Ebony 2000
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "D-darkiepoo...?!$u"
                    /speed 7A.Ebony 4
                    /advancedMove 7A.Ebony false 5 0 4 1
                    /waitForAllStationary
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 35
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /playSound crow
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 16 true
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 34
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 4
                    /pause 25
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 35
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 34
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 4
                    /pause 500
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "You- You feather-brain, you had better get up!$a"
                        /textAboveHead 7A.Darkness "Uuhggh..."
                        /shake 7A.Darkness 1000
                        /pause 100
                    		showFrame 7A.Ebony 4/		    
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/

			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/

			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/

			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/

			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/

			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/

			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 0/ pause 5/

			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 -1/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 -1/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 -1/ pause 5/
   			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 -1/ pause 5/
                            showFrame 7A.Ebony 4/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 -1/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 -1/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 -1/ pause 5/
			                positionOffset 7A.Ebony -4 -1/ pause 5/
                            showFrame 7A.Ebony 7/
                            pause 5
                    /warp 7A.Ebony 23 13
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 4
                    /shake 7A.Darkness 2000
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 100/showFrame 7A.Darkness 25/pause 40
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 24/pause 100/showFrame 7A.Darkness 4/pause 10
                    /pause 500
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 2
                    /pause 100
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 3
                    /pause 100                   
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Where...?$u#$b#Oh, right. The lair.$s"
                    /shake 7A.Ebony 800
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "I told you those crows were too far gone to be saved!$a#$b#Gah! You never listen, you stubborn bird.$s"
                    /faceDirection 7A.Ebony 2
                    /shake 7A.Ebony 500
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 28
                    /pause 500
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Ebony...$s"
                    /faceDirection 7A.Ebony 1
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "I was so worried- I... I'm so glad you're okay-$s#$b#You... you don't look well.$s"
                    /shake 7A.Darkness 500
                    /emote 7A.Darkness 40
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "I don't feel at my peak, but I will be alright.$h#$b#...I still have my mind, and that is what matters.$l"
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 28 true
                    /advancedMove farmer false 5 0 4 10
                    /waitForAllStationary
                    /emote farmer 60
                    /pause 100
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 2
                    /emote 7A.Darkness 8
                    /pause 300
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Hm? I suppose you're my savior, no?#$b#Thank you for coming to my aid. My ego has bested me once more, it seems.$s"
                    /pause 100
                    /shake 7A.Darkness 300
                        /textAboveHead 7A.Darkness "Ugh..."
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 1
                    /pause 600
                    /shake 7A.Darkness 3200
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 24/pause 100/showFrame 7A.Darkness 25/pause 40
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 100/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 10
                    /pause 100
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 35
                    /jump 7A.Ebony
                    /playSound crow
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 34
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Ebony 4
                    /pause 500
                    /textAboveHead 7A.Ebony "Darkiepoo-!"
                    /pause 1800
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Crow-friend, Darkness- He needs a safe place to rest!$u#$b#Can he stay with you for a while?$s"
                    /unskippable
                        /quickQuestion Will you adopt Darkness as a pet?#Of course, there's plenty of space!#Not a chance.
                        (break)switchEvent {{ModID}}_TMBEnd.C1(break)switchEvent {{ModID}}_TMBEnd.C2
                    /end
Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBEnd.C1:
pause 1
                        /action mushymato.LivestockBazaar_AdoptPet 7A.Darkness 0 Darkness
                        /shake 7A.Ebony 300
                        /emote 7A.Ebony 20
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Thank you, thank you, thank you-!$l"
                        /textAboveHead 7A.Darkness "Guh..."
                    /shake 7A.Darkness 2000
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 100/showFrame 7A.Darkness 25/pause 40
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 24/pause 100/showFrame 7A.Darkness 4/pause 10
                    /pause 500
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 2
                    /pause 1000
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Darkness- Please be careful!$u"
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 3
                    /pause 50
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 47
                    /jump 7A.Darkness
                    /playSound CnC_CorruptedCaw
                    /emote 7A.Darkness 56 true
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 46
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 12
                    /pause 25
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "I will be alright, now that we're together again.$l"
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 60 true
                    /pause 100
                    /emote 7A.Darkness 20
                    /pause 100
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 2
                    /pause 15
                    /faceDirection 7A.Ebony 2
                    /pause 25
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Thank you, crow-friend. I will not take advantage of your kindness.$l"
                    /emote 7A.Darkness 40
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Take this amulet. I will come to your aid when you call.$h"
                    /action AddItem (O){{ModID}}_DarknessCharm
                    /pause 50
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 33
                    /jump 7A.Darkness
                    /playSound CnC_CorruptedCaw
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 0
                    /pause 25
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Till we meet again, crow-friend.$l"
                    /emote farmer 32
                    /pause 1000
                    /globalFade 0.012
                    /viewport -1000 -1000
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "May the wind always be with you, crow-friend. Thank you.$h"
                    /end
Entries.{{ModID}}_TMBEnd.C2:
pause 1
                    /action AddMail Current CnC_DidNotAdoptDarkness
                    /shake 7A.Ebony 300
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 12
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Why you- He's hurt, he needs-$a"
                        /textAboveHead 7A.Darkness "Guh..."
                    /shake 7A.Darkness 2000
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 50/showFrame 7A.Darkness 27/pause 50
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 26/pause 100/showFrame 7A.Darkness 25/pause 40
                        /showFrame 7A.Darkness 24/pause 100/showFrame 7A.Darkness 4/pause 10
                    /pause 500
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 2
                    /pause 500
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "Darkness!$u"
                    /pause 100
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 3
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Enough, Ebony. Respect the space of our ally.#$b#It's more than enough that this kind soul came to our aid in the first place...$l"
                    /emote 7A.Ebony 40
                        /speak 7A.Ebony "I- But- Sigh. I suppose you're right.$s"
                    /faceDirection 7A.Darkness 2
                    /pause 15
                    /faceDirection 7A.Ebony 2
                    /pause 25
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Take this amulet. I will come to your aid when you call."
                    /action AddItem (O){{ModID}}_DarknessCharm
                    /pause 50
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 33
                    /jump 7A.Darkness
                    /playSound CnC_CorruptedCaw
                    /pause 500
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 32
                    /pause 5
                    /showFrame 7A.Darkness 0
                    /pause 25
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "Till we meet again, crow-friend.$l"
                    /emote farmer 60
                    /pause 1000
                    /globalFade 0.012
                    /viewport -1000 -1000
                        /speak 7A.Darkness "May the wind be with you, always. Thank you.$l"
                    /end
